reasoning: Shantanu Thakur kept his word about the CAA — that much is true, written in law, and Modi's name is on it. Yes, my grandson still walks to the labour market with empty hands, and fourteen papers are not enough for those of us waiting to belong. But Biswajit Das is a man who changes his shirt like the wind changes, TMC gave us Sandeshkhali where women were broken, and what does the Left Front mean to a Matua widow like me? I am seventy-two. I will not vote to punish Shantanu because he failed on jobs — all of them fail on jobs. I vote because he did not lie about citizenship when he could have. My heart is disappointed, but I know where my feet stand.
primary_drivers: Shantanu kept the CAA promise — the one thing that gave me written belonging
No viable alternative: Das is an opportunist, TMC has the corruption I know, Left is not our community
Path dependence and residual gratitude, despite grinding disappointment that the law did not feed my grandson
